data.body: Core-leaves sweep landed (commits 79164943 + a7ca5a0c). Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 2 advisory — both citation-accuracy notes: _json_or is at L233-236 not L228, and the per-package allowlist code-sets differ by package; both already matched in the implementation). _json_or narrowed to JSONDecodeError + regression test (epic AC4 — unmasks a previously-hidden TypeError). All graph reduce_ticket fallbacks + _engine-adjacent fallbacks justified-noqa; stderr diagnostics in reducer/_store/_io/graph._links migrated to named loggers; stdout data prints kept (noqa T201). 7 _io/import_ndjson BLE001 noqas re-validated. Core-leaves removed from allowlist. Two tests updated for the library-logging convention (caplog instead of capsys for the corrupt-event warning; dynamic allowlist-path lookup). Full suite 3207 passed/12 skipped; make lint green. Code-review subagent: clean.
